goal: Code review verdict is schema-compliant, includes validated_blocking_issues array, and enforces 4-step validation protocol

input.task: Review scoped backend change for correctness, security, and test coverage

validation_protocol.description: Every CRITICAL or MAJOR issue must have validation_status populated as confirmed, rejected, or unvalidated
validation_protocol.blocking_gate: Orchestrator blocks only on validated_blocking_issues, not raw issues array

positive.assertion: validated_blocking_issues[*].severity accepts only the field's schema enum values
positive.blocking_semantics: Only confirmed CRITICAL or MAJOR findings belong in validated_blocking_issues

negative.assertion: Soft prose labels are rejected when used as validated_blocking_issues[*].severity values

expected.rejection_reason_required_for_rejected_i: A rejected finding MUST include rejection_reason; schema allows the field on issues with validation_status=rejected per False Positive Audit Trail requirement
